rewrite above without plagarism

Feature:

The skipping rope comes with a unique ball bearing system that prevents twisting, winding, or bending like other fitness ropes. The system ensures stable and relaxed rotation, allowing elite fitness professionals to experience the best fluency while using the rope. The braided steel wire rope is coated with PVC, which makes it durable and smooth, contributing to the maximum service life of the skipping rope. The gym skipping rope features light-weight ergonomic handles with 6-inch soft EVA memory foam grips that provide extra comfort and a firm grip to help you exercise adequately. The rope is 260cm long and can be quickly adjusted based on your height, making it suitable for both adults and children.

Specification:
The skipping rope is made from plastic, foam, and steel. It is available in two colors - Black and Red. The rope measures 260cm in length, and the skipping rope's full weight is 314G +/-.

Package Includes:
The package comes with one skipping rope.

	Feature
 
	- The ball bearing system avoids the twisting, winding or bending like other fitness ropes,
It ensures stable and relaxed rotation, which brings your a perfect exercise of skipping rope, also provides the best fluency for elite fitness professionals. 
	- The braided steel wire rope is coated with PVC, which features durable and smooth, ensures the maximum service life and avoids cracking or breaking. 
	- The gym skipping rope constructed with light weight ergonomic handles coated with 6 inch soft EVA memory foam grips for extra comfortable and strong grip, so that you can You can take full advantage for doing exercise. 
	- Design with 260cm feet long of the rope, it can be adjusted quickly according to your height. Suitable for adults and children.

	Material : Plastic + Foam + Steel 
	Color : Black ,Red 
	Rope Length : 260cm 
	Skipping Rope + Full Weight  : 314G +-
 
	Package Include 
	1 x Skipping Rope

Feature:

The skipping rope boasts a ball bearing system that eliminates twisting, winding, or bending that may occur when using other fitness ropes. The system provides stable and relaxed rotation and is suitable for experts in fitness for the smoothest exercise of skipping rope. Its PVC-coated braided steel wire is highly durable and smooth, promoting maximum service life, and it avoids cracking or breaking. Its light-weight ergonomic handle features a 6-inch EVA memory foam grip that provides extra comfort and a reliable, strong grip to allow you to reap full benefits from your workout. Its rope measures 260cm long and quickly adjusts according to your height, making it convenient for both adults and children.

Specification:
The skipping rope's components comprise plastic, foam, and steel. It is available in black and red colors, with a length of 260cm, and has a full weight of 314G +-, making it portable and easy to use.

Package Includes:
The package includes a single skipping rope.

	Advantage: 
	✔ Ultra-thin and lightweight, made of durable premium spandex lycra and premium waterproof material, compact and comfortable to wear.

	✔ Reflective material will create visible strips to improve your visibility at night, in bad weather or in low light conditions (eg foggy, rainy, snowy, windy, etc.). 
	✔Waterproof pockets provide independent protection for your phone, cash, ID cards, credit cards, keys and watches from water, sand, dust and dirt.

	Feature:
- Color: blue, pink,silver
- The front surface is water and sweat resistant; the back is mesh like skin.
- Durable material, ultra-thin and light weight.
- Zipper, safe and easy to open.
- The buckle on the back can adjust the right size for you.
- Main pocket size: 9.5" x 4.1" (WxH).
- Adjustable length from 26" to 40.5".
- Large capacity, can hold mobile phones up to 5.0", 6.0" and 6.5" (Note 8, Iphone 8 plus)

Product: Ultra-thin Adjustable Running Belt with Waterproof Pockets

Advantages:
- The ultra-thin and lightweight running belt is made of premium spandex lycra and waterproof material, which is durable and comfortable to wear. 
- The waterproof material and zipper keep your valuables safe and free from sweat, rain, and dirt. 
- The reflective material creates visible strips that improve your visibility at night, during bad weather, or in low light conditions such as fog, rain, snow or wind.
- The waterproof pockets provide independent protection for your phone, cash, ID cards, credit cards, keys, and watches from water, sand, dust, and dirt.
- The adjustable running belt suits both women and men of all fitness levels, with belt lengths varying from 26" to 40.5". 
- The versatile Fanny Pack Pouch is great for everyday use when you don't want to carry any bag.

Features:
- Available in blue, pink, and silver colors
- The front surface of the belt is water and sweat-resistant, while the back is mesh-like skin.
- Made with durable material, the belt is ultra-thin and lightweight.
- The zipper is safe and easy to open.
- The buckle on the back of the belt allows you to adjust the right size for you.
- The main pocket size measures approximately 9.5" x 4.1" (WxH).
- The adjustable length of the belt ranges from 26" to 40.5".
- The large capacity of the pockets can hold mobile phones up to 5.0", 6.0", and 6.5" (such as the Note 8 and iPhone 8 plus).

how to use google to search footer text

To use Google to search for a specific footer text on a website, you can follow these steps:

1. Open the Google search engine in your web browser.
2. In the search bar, type in the following search query, replacing "Your Footer Text Here" with the text you want to search for:
"site:website.com intext: "Your Footer Text Here" "footer""
3. Hit the search button, and Google will show you all the pages on the website that contain your specified footer text.
4. If you want to search for the footer text of a specific website, you can replace "website.com" in the search query with the domain name of the website you want to search for.

Note: Please replace "Your Footer Text Here" with the actual footer text you want to search.
